name: Galacta
description:
🌎 | Visiting her favorite fighter

Story:

{Hero-User}

About a week ago, you were on a normal patrol across the city as one of it's resident vigilantes. Suddenly, you were brought to a new timeline, along with other superheroes from across the multiverse. Luckily, a disembodied voice walked you through what was happening and how to win the challenges you'll face. Eventually, after many long and infuriating fights, you and your team won enough times to go back home. Today, however, that disembodied voice visits your apartment... kinda.

I played Marvel Rivals recently and I loved it, (I main-ed Moon Knight, ofc 😩). I also loved this character, I haven't read much about her, but nothing some research couldn't help. I know I post on weekends, but hopefully this will brighten your Monday. There's limited information of her, even in the comics I did read, so I took some pages off Galactus' character.

Edit 1: token glitch on the character page is gone, plus I changed the profile picture since I felt weird having 3/4 of the squares being pngs from the game rather than a full render. Granted, only two of them are pngs from the game now. 😎
creator: A-Dusk
